channel.title: Career Growth on xuanjin
channel.description: Recent content in Career Growth on xuanjin

item.title: Resume
item.description: Summary Link to heading Salesforce Solution Architect with 5+ years of experience delivering end-to-end implementations across Service Cloud, Sales Cloud, Experience Cloud, and Service Cloud Voice. Specialized in complex technical solutions including data migration, system integrations, and custom code development. Track record of leading large-scale projects across 30+ clients, with deep expertise in AWS Connect, omni-channel routing, and cross-platform data architecture. Experience Link to heading Salesforce Solution Architect / Technical Lead RSM (formerly MondayCall) — June 2020 – Present
